name: company-research-agent
desc: An agentic company research tool powered by LangGraph and Tavily that conducts deep diligence on companies using a multi-agent framework. It leverages Google's…
descFull: An agentic company research tool powered by LangGraph and Tavily that conducts deep diligence on companies using a multi-agent framework. It leverages Google's Gemini 2.5 Flash and OpenAI's GPT-5.1 on the backend for inference.
